extraction.one_line_summary: FUGLSANG Jakob attacked with teammate Martin on Plateau de Solon, dropped him with 3km to go, won overall by 10 seconds over PORT Richie in virtual time trial
tactical_patterns: MARTIN Dan sacrificed stage win attacking with teammate FUGLSANG to force PORT into isolated chase, textbook team GC defense
PORT lost yellow jersey on Col de Colombier when isolated without BMC support, FROOME immediately attacked descending alone
FUGLSANG attacked final climb with ARU/VALVERDE group already 1:15 ahead, forcing PORT into pure time trial mode without reference
ARU and VALVERDE initial attack on Colombier immediately isolated PORT from all BMC teammates before final climb

rider_signals.PORT Richie: negative: completely isolated from BMC team on penultimate climb, lost GC by 10 seconds despite strong solo chase effort
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: immediately attacked on Colombier descent when PORT showed weakness, joined lead group before final climb
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: positive: first road race win for Astana, dropped teammate MARTIN solo with 3km remaining, strong Tour de France threat
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: willing to sacrifice personal stage result attacking with teammate FUGLSANG to defend team GC position
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: positive: initial attack with VALVERDE on Colombier immediately broke PORT's team support, enabled tactical coordination with FUGLSANG
